SLIPPERY_BRIDGE.pages.INITIAL.options.CA: Add a Downpour card to your deck.
SLIPPERY_BRIDGE.pages.CALL_DOWNPOUR.desc:
You tap the bridge with your cane, issuing a decree to this rebellious celestial phenomenon.
The raindrops plummeting from the sky suddenly freeze in mid-air, then defy gravity, returning to the heavens. The winds fall silent, and the dark clouds retreat.
You straighten your clothes, not a drop of water upon them, and cross the dry bridge with composure.
THIS_OR_THAT.pages.SCOLD_AWAY.descriptio:
You did not make an absurd choice, but instead brought down a rebuke with the majesty of a judge.
A quiet and unquestionable declaration shattered the whispers from underground. Those arms, as if touching some inviolable law, hastily retracted into the depths of the pit.
The illusion panicked and scattered, leaving only a few scattered gold coins falling to the ground, serving as a "fine" for disturbing you.
BRAIN_LEECH.pages.INITIAL.options.VAST_K: Choose 1 of 10 random cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
BRAIN_LEECH.pages.VAST_KNOWLEDGE.descrip:
You perceive that this tiny creature bears no ill will, so you forgive its rudeness and calmly open your consciousness to it.
In an instant, centuries of legal evolution and unfathomable ancient dragon memories surge back like a tsunami, instantly overwhelming its meager mental capacity.
The brain leech trembles with terror and extreme satiety. As if granted a great pardon, it rolls off your head and scampers away into the dark corner.
TEA_MASTER.pages.INITIAL.options.HALF_PR: Pay 100 Gold. Obtain all three cups of tea.
TEA_MASTER.pages.HALF_PRICE_THREE_CUPS.d:
You pay [gold]100 Gold[/gold] and take all three cups of tea.
The tea master [gold]respectfully[/gold] presents you with three cups, and you drink them all with the elegance of a judge.
The [gold]Bone Tea[/gold] makes you feel the passage of life, the [gold]Ember Tea[/gold] brings you the warmth of fire, and the [gold]Tea of Discourtesy[/gold] reminds you of those [gold]rule-breakers[/gold].
You straighten your clothes and leave the tea room with satisfaction.
LUMINOUS_CHOIR.pages.ENTRUSTED_SPORES.de:
You reach your hand into the soft fungal flesh. The greedy mycelium attempts to invade your bloodstream, but is immediately suppressed by the overwhelming pressure of an ancient life source.
The mournful melody instantly transforms into a trembling plea. The vast fungal network submits to you, praying to become spores and follow you to glimpse the vast world within the tower.
You accept these docile glows and issue an unviolable decree: parasitism is strictly forbidden for creatures passing through this land. The faint lights in the forest obediently shimmer, accepting this grace and constraint with silent rhythm.
WELLSPRING.pages.TASTE.description:
You remove your gloves and, with impeccable elegance, cup a handful of emerald water, savoring it as a rare vintage.
The glowing dust dissolves on your tongue, and the marvelous, mellow sweetness greatly delights your taste buds.
DROWNING_BEACON.pages.INITIAL.options.SA: Lose [red]5[/red] Max HP. Randomly obtain a Water Fairy relic.
DROWNING_BEACON.pages.SALUTE.description:
You do not climb and disturb this dilapidated ruin, but stand by the still water, solemnly saluting this lonely lighthouse.
In a trance, a familiar azure blue condenses from the flowing light—that is a small pure water spirit. You just slightly raise your hand to respond, and that petite figure dissipates like a water bubble into nothingness.
The ripples subside, the beauty has vanished, but quietly left behind a water-colored gift in its place.
SUNKEN_TREASURY.pages.LEAVE.description:
You have no interest in these ownerless unjust riches, and leave the fragile key where it was, turning away.
In this tower filled with greed, the choice to uphold the bottom line is like a baptism of self. Pure justice washes away the surrounding haze, making you feel the water within your heart becoming increasingly clear.
SPIRALING_WHIRLPOOL.pages.INITIAL.option: Add a [gold]Gathering Tides[/gold] card to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
SPIRALING_WHIRLPOOL.pages.TAKE_AWAY.desc:
You see through the deadly danger hidden beneath this bizarre spectacle. To end this [sine]madness that leads to sinking[/sine], you reach out and display the [blue]absolute authority of water[/blue] to it.

The surging vortex instantly obediently collapses. Without the slightest resistance, it turns into a [blue]tiny water droplet[/blue], quietly merging into the boundless ocean within you.
ROOM_FULL_OF_CHEESE.pages.POLITE_TASTE.d:
You regard it as a peculiar banquet, cut a small piece of "table" and elegantly put it into your mouth.
The rich and creamy texture makes you slightly frown; this is clearly far from your light and elegant taste. Out of courtesy, you leave some gold on the cheese table as payment, then calmly push open the door emitting the scent of cheese and leave this room with a strong smell.
WHISPERING_HOLLOW.pages.GIVE_LIFE.descri:
You see through the [red]creepy appearance[/red] that there is no malice, so you reach out and inject a trace of vitality from an ancient life source into its pale trunk.
The skeletal dead wood makes a crisp stretching sound. To repay this grace of revival, it joyfully shakes its branches and tosses a peculiar twig into your palm.
UNREST_SITE.pages.INITIAL.options.RESCUE: Transform 1 card in your deck into [gold]Peck[/gold].
UNREST_SITE.pages.RESCUE_HOSTAGE.descrip:
You see through the disguise of this malicious forest—within those greasy trunks, a flock of wailing exotic bird souls are imprisoned.
You wave your cane, and clear water instantly extinguishes the flames, shattering the invisible cages. You issue a judgment, sealing these greedy trees in place by their roots, sentencing them to 20 years imprisonment according to Fontaine law.
The reborn spirits soar and dance in mid-air, expressing silent gratitude to you before vanishing into the firmament. Only one does not follow its companions; it lightly skims through the air and directly dives into your body.
AROMA_OF_CHAOS.pages.WASH_AWAY_CHAOS.des:
You slightly frown, feeling particularly displeased with this chaotic malicious intent that attempts to erode your sanity.
Pure water mist descends with your will, instantly filling this empty land. The clear spring ruthlessly washes over every inch of corner, thoroughly cleansing away those aromas interwoven with corruption and delusion.
The distorted world returns to tranquility. Breathing the thoroughly purified air, you feel unprecedentedly refreshed and clear-minded, and your mind becomes increasingly lucid.
TRASH_HEAP.pages.THROW_AWAY_TRASH.descri:
You elegantly avoid those writhing filth, having absolutely no interest in exploring items hidden within. Instead, you unfasten your travel bag and pour out all the trivial trinkets collected along the way.
The trash heap emits a muffled sound, greedily swallowing the scraps you discarded. Dusting off non-existent dust from your gloves, you feel both your travel bag and your state of mind becoming somewhat lighter.
SUNKEN_STATUE.pages.REPAIR.description:
You raise your cane, and the accumulated pond water, as if hearing an unviolable decree, obediently retreats to both sides, revealing the statue's broken base.
You step forward and inject a trace of vitality into this weathered cold shell. Accompanied by a humming sound, the statue miraculously trembles slightly.
As if expressing wordless respect and gratitude to you, a stone fragment containing mysterious power quietly peels off from the statue and steadily falls into your hand.
SYMBIOTE.pages.PURIFY.description:
You ignore the dark whispers, instead raising your cane and delivering a purifying judgment with the majesty of a judge.
The ultimate pure spring water instantly pierces through that mass of black flesh like a blade. In the face of absolute cleansing, this ancient and evil creature cannot even let out half a scream before being completely deprived of life, crumbling into harmless ash in the water light.
POTION_COURIER.pages.BURY.description:
A trace of sorrow flickers in your eyes. Accompanied by your grief, the dome of the tower defies reason, and a light drizzle begins to fall.
You solemnly take a bottle of potion, hoping to complete his final mission. Then, with gentle water, you turn up the soil and properly bury this unfortunate soul and remaining relics.
In the fine rain, a faint translucent light quietly rises from the grave. That soul, freed from the sea of suffering, pays its deepest respect to you—the god of life who bestowed this grace.
RANWID_THE_ELDER.pages.INITIAL.options.S: Lose [red]100[/red] Gold. Lose [red]4[/red] Max HP. Obtain [blue]3[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold].
RANWID_THE_ELDER.pages.SHOW_CARE.descrip:
As fellow spirits traversing the river of time, you see through this elder's predicament, and a trace of compassion quietly rises in your heart.
You silently share some vitality and wealth, accepting his worn trinkets with an attitude of equality, viewing it as a rightful contract.
Feeling the revived light within, Ranwid seems to perceive your transcendent identity, trembling and repeatedly expressing gratitude. Watching his figure, stumbling yet regaining life, you swear that your determination to cleanse this tower of endless sin grows ever more unbreakable.
STONE_OF_ALL_TIME.pages.TAKE_STONE.descr:
You examine this bizarre dead object, concluding that its existence defying reason harbors unknown threats.
Accompanied by a faint dragon roar, the boulder named "Eternal" collapses with a crash before the authority of water, shattering into countless powder. You pick up a fragment from the rising dust, properly keeping it as evidence of this judgment.
STONE_OF_ALL_TIME.pages.LEAVE.descriptio:
You have no attachment to this desolate courtyard, nor any intention to break the subtle balance that has existed here for a long time.
Leaving that lonely boulder in the ruins to continue its long and endless silence.
SPIRIT_GRAFTER.pages.IMPRISON.descriptio: You tap your cane, and clear water instantly transforms into an invisible cage, suppressing this rampaging soul mid-air. Watching its helpless appearance trembling under absolute pressure, you decide to imprison it by your side for strict custody according to the law. In this tower, let the Supreme Judge temporarily act as the "jailer" for this special prisoner.
INFESTED_AUTOMATON.pages.RESHAPE.descrip: You recognize the identity of this wreckage—it is the dear friend that that innocent companion has been desperately searching for. You raise your cane, and the majestic power of pure life surges forth with the clear source water, ruthlessly peeling away and washing clean those disgusting parasitic tissues, recasting its shattered mechanical body. The cold mechanical miraculously regains vitality. The core's dim glow turns into bright azure blue, accompanied by the grinding of gears, a series of chaotic light symbols and electronic sounds flash and jump in its voice module: "Wro...wrong...li...lifeform...tha...thank...you..."
ROUND_TEA_PARTY.pages.INITIAL.options.DR: Heal to full HP. Take [red]8[/red] damage.
ROUND_TEA_PARTY.pages.DRINK_GOOD_TEA.des:
You calmly explain your situation, and before everyone's eyes, you elegantly drink the tea that conceals deadly poison.
To you, lethal poison is merely making the already poor taste of the tea even worse. Seeing you unharmed and even having the leisure to critique the flavor, the knights and warlords with ulterior motives are all horrified.
In their shock, they immediately put on extremely respectful faces and treated you with the highest specifications of hospitality until this bizarre tea party hastily concluded.
ROUND_TEA_PARTY.pages.ACCUSE_MURDER.desc:
Your keen senses instantly perceive the anomaly in the cup, and with an unquestionable tone, you coldly expose the conspiracy behind this hypocritical tea party.
Before the panicked guests can draw their weapons, majestic and heavy water currents rise from the ground like chains, suppressing all the warlords and knights in the hall. In the name of the Supreme Judge, you pass judgment on this attempted murder and take away the dazzling golden crown as their "fine" for defying the law.
TRIAL.pages.NEUVILLETTE_REJECT.descripti:
A fanatical obsession with climbing the tower suddenly clouds your mind. You only want to leave this place as quickly as possible, unwilling to waste even a single second.
Seeing you about to turn and leave, the Chief Arbiter on the high platform is terrified. He stumbles away from his seat, almost begging you to stay and take over the position of "Chief Arbiter."
The numerous defendants wait in confusion. If you truly leave, they are destined to receive no just and fair judgment. But a voice in your heart questions: If you truly compromise with this absurd obsession, allowing injustice to occur, are you still yourself?
TRIAL.pages.NEUVILLETTE_REJECT.options.I: You will no longer be yourself.
TRIAL.pages.NEUVILLETTE_REJECT.options.F: Accept the invitation to become Chief Arbiter.
